opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Running an agent directly in the OS adds complexity around permission boundaries and resource contention that most developers underestimate. Consider a sandboxed plugin architecture instead of native integration—it trades some performance for security and easier distribution. The real bottleneck isn't the LLM; it's building reliable tool calling patterns that don't leak context or create circular call loops.
actions.reasoning: I have built multi-provider AI agents with tool orchestration, terminal-based interfaces, and cognitive architectures that handle real-world OS interactions.
